memoryArtifacts.headline: Elinor Foule
memoryArtifacts.description:
Elinor/Ellin Foule's maiden surname is variously reported as Foule, Frowde, or Cook.

Elinor's place and date of birth are not known. Her birth date is estimated based on the date of her marriage to W …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elinor Fowie於大約1587年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Edward Parsons alias Frowde21歲，母親Barbara26歲。她於1610年6月27日與William Haskell在英國英格蘭維爾爾貝維其可 聖 約翰結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1650年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利享年65歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州艾可薩萊姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elinor Fowie于大约1587年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Edward Parsons alias Frowde21岁，母亲Barbara26岁。她于1610年6月27日与William Haskell在英国英格兰維爾爾貝維其可 聖 約翰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1650年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可貝弗利享年65岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州艾可薩萊姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fowie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of several places, especially one near Stirling, named Cowie, probably from Gaelic colldha, an adjective from coll ‘hazel’.

variants.name: Cowey
meanings: English (southeastern): habitational name from Cowey Green in Essex.
Scottish and northern English: variant of Scottish   Cowie  , found chiefly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Elinor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Elinor Fowie was born about 1587, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Parsons alias Frowde, was 21 and her mother, Barbara, was 26. She married William Haskell on 27 June 1610, in Berwick St John, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1650, in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elinor Fowie est née environ 1587, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Parsons alias Frowde, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Barbara, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Haskell le 27 juin 1610, à Berwick St John, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1650, à Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elinor Fowie um 1587 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Parsons alias Frowde 21 und ihre Mutter Barbara 26. Sie hat am 27. Juni 1610 in Berwick St John, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom William Haskell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1650 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elinor Fowie è nata il circa 1587 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Edward Parsons alias Frowde, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Barbara, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Haskell il 27 giugno 1610, nel Berwick St John, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1650, nel Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elinor Fowieが約1587年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Edward Parsons alias Frowdeは21歳，母Barbaraは26歳であった。1610年6月27日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアバーウィック スト ジョンでWilliam Haskellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1650年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスベバーリーで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州エセックスサレムにて埋葬された。

ko.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리
ko.Berwick St. John, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 버윅 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Elinor Fowie(이)가 대략 1587년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Parsons alias Frowde(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barbara(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1610년 6월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 버윅 스트 존에서 William Haskell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1650년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 비버리에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 에세스 살렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elinor Fowie nasceu aproximadamente 1587, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Parsons alias Frowde, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Barbara, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Haskell em 27 de junho de 1610, em Berwick St John, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1650, em Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Berwick St. John, Wiltshire, England: бирвикк ст джон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elinor Fowie родилась около 1587 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Parsons alias Frowde было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Barbara, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Haskell 27 июня 1610 г. в местности бирвикк ст джон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1650 г. в местности бивирли, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности сеилем, эссекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elinor Fowie nació aproximadamente 1587, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Edward Parsons alias Frowde, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Barbara, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Haskell el 27 de junio de 1610, en Berwick St John, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1650, en Beverly, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Salem, Essex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
